---
name: 14.07-cates-policy-and-suppressions
description: Create and validate a sandbox-only CATES policy with progressive gates and governed exceptions.
model: GPT-5.5 (copilot)
---

# Define CATES Policy And Exceptions

## Objective

Create `.cates.yml` only inside the sample repository and evaluate stable gates
without weakening critical security controls.

## Required Steps

1. Read `cates-exercises/07-cates-policy-and-suppressions.md`.
2. Review unresolved stable findings and current conformance.
3. Create `cates-exercises/workspace/sample-repository/.cates.yml` with a
   minimum score of 70, Level 2 target, critical/high failure severities, and a
   1,500 always-loaded-token maximum.
4. Demonstrate a narrow rule severity override.
5. Add a suppression only when a confirmed false positive or temporary accepted
   risk exists. Include scope, rationale, owner, expiry, and compensating
   control.
6. Never suppress hardcoded secrets, injection, unsafe execution, or approval
   bypass to obtain a passing claim.
7. Run the analyzer with the policy and explain exit code `0`, `1`, or `2`.

## Validation

Save policy-aware JSON evidence under `reports/07-policy.json` and confirm
disabled and suppressed findings remain auditable.
